_comment: Species: Spirit Fish (灵鱼) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Fish

canonical.appearance: Fish 0.5 m, scales spirit-silver, swims through spirit-water
canonical.size: 0.5 m adult, 2 jin; ancient 2 m, 200 jin
canonical.behavior: Schools in spirit-springs; cultivates by absorbing water-essence
canonical.relationships: Prey for spirit eagles, spirit snakes, cold dragons
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_fish — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
